---
title: "Welcome to My Analytics Lab"
sidebar: false 
---

Hello! My name is Onur Can Gültekin. I am an Industrial Engineering student at Hacettepe University.

This is my personal webpage. Please stay tuned to follow my works on data analytics, blog posts, and more.

HAVE FUN AND GOOD LUCK!

```{=html}

<style>
#app{max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;padding:1rem 0;font-family:var(--font-sans)}
#canvas{border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);display:block;margin:0 auto;cursor:pointer}
.section-title{font-size:13px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin:0 0 6px;font-weight:500;text-align:center}
.row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin:8px 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
.pill-btn{padding:5px 16px;border-radius:20px;border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);background:var(--color-background-primary);color:var(--color-text-primary);font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;transition:all .15s;font-weight:400}
.pill-btn.active{background:var(--sel,#e25822);color:#fff;border-color:transparent;font-weight:500}
.pill-btn:hover:not(.active){background:var(--color-background-secondary)}
#timing-bar-wrap{width:320px;height:12px;background:var(--color-background-secondary);border-radius:6px;margin:8px auto 0;border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);overflow:hidden}
#timing-bar{height:100%;width:0%;border-radius:6px;background:#e25822;transition:background .1s}
#msg{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;min-height:20px;margin:6px 0 0;color:var(--color-text-primary);text-align:center}
#shoot-btn{margin:8px auto 0;display:block;font-size:14px;padding:9px 40px;border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);background:#e25822;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500}
#shoot-btn:active{transform:scale(.97)}
#shoot-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:default}
.stat-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:28px;margin:8px 0 0}
.stat{text-align:center}
.stat-num{font-size:22px;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary)}
.stat-lbl{font-size:11px;color:var(--color-text-secondary)}
.divider{border:none;border-top:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);margin:16px 0}
#leaderboard{background:var(--color-background-primary);border:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);border-radius:var(--border-radius-lg);padding:14px 16px}
#lb-list{margin:8px 0 0}
.lb-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:6px 0;border-bottom:0.5px solid var(--color-border-tertiary);font-size:13px}
.lb-row:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.lb-row.highlight{background:rgba(226,88,34,0.1);border-radius:6px;padding-left:6px;margin-left:-6px}
.lb-rank{width:22px;text-align:center;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary)}
.lb-name{flex:1;color:var(--color-text-primary)}
.lb-score{font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary);min-width:36px;text-align:right}
#shots-display{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin:10px 0 0;flex-wrap:wrap}
.shot-dot{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--color-background-secondary);border:1.5px solid var(--color-border-secondary);transition:all .3s}
.shot-dot.make{background:#27ae60;border-color:#27ae60}
.shot-dot.miss{background:#e74c3c;border-color:#e74c3c}
.shot-dot.pending{border-color:#e25822}
#endgame-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.72);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center;backdrop-filter:blur(5px)}
#endgame-overlay.show{display:flex}
#endgame-modal{background:#fff;border:0.5px solid #ddd;border-radius:18px;padding:28px 24px;max-width:400px;width:92%;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 24px 64px rgba(0,0,0,0.45)}
#endgame-modal h2{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;margin:0 0 4px;color:#111;text-align:center}
.final-score{font-size:44px;font-weight:700;color:#e25822;text-align:center;margin:6px 0 2px;line-height:1}
.final-sub{font-size:13px;color:#555;text-align:center;margin:0 0 14px}
#name-section{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px}
#name-section label{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:#111}
#modal-name-input{width:100%;box-sizing:border-box;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #ccc;background:#fff;color:#111;font-size:14px}
#modal-save-btn{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;background:#e25822;color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:600}
#modal-save-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:default}
#modal-status{font-size:12px;color:#555;text-align:center;min-height:16px;margin-top:2px}
#modal-not-hard{font-size:13px;color:#555;text-align:center;padding:6px 0;font-style:italic}
#modal-lb{margin-top:12px}
#modal-lb-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#111;margin-bottom:6px}
#modal-lb-list .lb-row{border-bottom-color:#e5e5e5}
#modal-lb-list .lb-rank{color:#555}
#modal-lb-list .lb-name{color:#111}
#modal-lb-list .lb-score{color:#111}
#play-again-btn{width:100%;padding:10px;border-radius:8px;background:#f1f1f1;color:#111;border:1px solid #ccc;cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;font-weight:500;margin-top:10px}
#play-again-btn:hover{background:#e2e2e2}
.lb-empty{font-size:13px;color:#666;padding:8px 0}
</style>

<div id="endgame-overlay">
  <div id="endgame-modal">
    <h2>Game Over! 🏀</h2>
    <div class="final-score" id="modal-score">0 pts</div>
    <div class="final-sub" id="modal-sub"></div>
    <hr class="divider" style="margin:12px 0">
    <div id="name-section">
      <label>Liderlik tablosuna adını yaz</label>
      <input id="modal-name-input" type="text" placeholder="İsmin" maxlength="20" autocomplete="off">
      <button id="modal-save-btn">Liderlik Tablosuna Kaydet 🏆</button>
      <div id="modal-status"></div>
    </div>
    <div id="modal-not-hard" style="display:none">Liderlik tablosuna girmek için <strong>Hard</strong> modda oyna!</div>
    <div id="modal-lb" style="display:none">
      <div id="modal-lb-title">🏆 Top 10 Global Leaderboard</div>
      <div id="modal-lb-list"></div>
    </div>
    <button id="play-again-btn">🔄 Tekrar Dene</button>
  </div>
</div>

<div id="app">
  <p class="section-title">Ball color</p>
  <div class="row" id="color-btns">
    <button class="pill-btn active" data-color="#e25822" style="--sel:#e25822">Orange</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#e74c3c" style="--sel:#e74c3c">Red</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#f59e0b" style="--sel:#f59e0b">Yellow</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#3b82f6" style="--sel:#3b82f6">Blue</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#8b5cf6" style="--sel:#8b5cf6">Purple</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-color="#ec4899" style="--sel:#ec4899">Pink</button>
  </div>
  <p class="section-title" style="margin-top:8px">Difficulty</p>
  <div class="row" id="diff-btns">
    <button class="pill-btn active" data-diff="Easy" data-speed="1.4" style="--sel:#27ae60">Easy</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-diff="Medium" data-speed="2.4" style="--sel:#f59e0b">Medium</button>
    <button class="pill-btn" data-diff="Hard" data-speed="3.8" style="--sel:#e74c3c">Hard</button>
  </div>
  <canvas id="canvas" width="420" height="320"></canvas>
  <div id="timing-bar-wrap"><div id="timing-bar"></div></div>
  <div id="msg">Press SHOOT to start! (10 shots per game)</div>
  <div id="shots-display"></div>
  <div class="stat-row">
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="score">0</div><div class="stat-lbl">Points</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="shots-left">10</div><div class="stat-lbl">Shots Left</div></div>
    <div class="stat"><div class="stat-num" id="pct">0%</div><div class="stat-lbl">Accuracy</div></div>
  </div>
  <div style="text-align:center"><button id="shoot-btn">SHOOT</button></div>
  <hr class="divider">
  <div id="leaderboard">
    <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between">
      <span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-primary)">🏆 Global Leaderboard <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-weight:400">(Hard mode only)</span></span>
      <span id="lb-loading" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--color-text-secondary)">Loading...</span>
    </div>
    <div id="lb-list"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  JSONBin.io Kurulumu — sadece aşağıdaki 2 satırı doldur
//
//  1) https://jsonbin.io  →  ücretsiz hesap aç
//  2) "New Bin" → içine şunu yapıştır: {"scores":[]}  → Create
//  3) Oluşturulan Bin'in ID'sini (URL'deki uzun kodu) JSONBIN_ID'ye yaz
//  4) Account → API Keys → Master Key'i JSONBIN_KEY'e yaz
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const JSONBIN_ID  = 'BURAYA_BIN_ID';     // örn: '6630f1a3acd3cb34a84b1234'
const JSONBIN_KEY = 'BURAYA_MASTER_KEY'; // örn: '$2a$10$xxxxxxxxxxxx'
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

const BIN_URL = `https://api.jsonbin.io/v3/b/${JSONBIN_ID}`;

async function loadLB() {
  try {
    const r = await fetch(BIN_URL + '/latest', {
      headers: { 'X-Master-Key': JSONBIN_KEY }
    });
    if (!r.ok) return [];
    const d = await r.json();
    return d.record.scores || [];
  } catch(e) { return []; }
}

async function saveLB(scores) {
  try {
    await fetch(BIN_URL, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'X-Master-Key': JSONBIN_KEY
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({ scores })
    });
  } catch(e) {}
}

// ─── Game state ──────────────────────────────────────────
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
let ballColor = '#e25822', timerSpeed = 1.4, diffLabel = 'Easy';
let state = 'idle', timerVal = 0, timerDir = 1;
let ballX, ballY, ballVx, ballVy, spin = 0, scored = false, animId = null;
let score = 0, makes = 0, shotsUsed = 0, shotResults = [];
let gameOver = false, scoreSaved = false;
let cheerTimer = 0, confetti = [];
const MAX_SHOTS = 10;
const HOOP_X = 330, HOOP_Y = 108, HOOP_R = 20;
const BX = 100, BY = 210;

const CROWD = [];
const crowdColors = ['#e74c3c','#3b82f6','#f59e0b','#8b5cf6','#ec4899','#27ae60','#e25822','#64748b'];
for(let row=0;row<3;row++) for(let i=0;i<22;i++) CROWD.push({x:10+i*19,y:18+row*28,color:crowdColors[Math.floor(Math.random()*crowdColors.length)],phase:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,speed:0.04+Math.random()*0.03});

function drawStands(){ctx.fillStyle='#1e293b';ctx.fillRect(0,0,W,H*0.42);for(let r=0;r<3;r++){ctx.fillStyle=r%2===0?'#263548':'#1e2d3e';ctx.fillRect(0,8+r*28,W,26);}}
function drawCrowd(){CROWD.forEach(p=>{const bounce=cheerTimer>0?Math.sin(p.phase)*6:Math.sin(p.phase*0.3)*1.5;const armAngle=cheerTimer>0?-2.0+Math.sin(p.phase+Date.now()*0.005)*0.4:-0.3;const cy=p.y+bounce;ctx.fillStyle=p.color;ctx.fillRect(p.x-5,cy+10,10,12);ctx.fillStyle='#f4a261';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(p.x,cy+7,6,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle=p.color;ctx.lineWidth=2;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(p.x-5,cy+13);ctx.lineTo(p.x-11,cy+13+Math.cos(armAngle)*8);ctx.moveTo(p.x+5,cy+13);ctx.lineTo(p.x+11,cy+13+Math.cos(armAngle)*8);ctx.stroke();p.phase+=p.speed;});}
function drawFloor(){ctx.fillStyle='#c8842a';ctx.fillRect(0,H*0.42,W,H*(1-0.42));ctx.strokeStyle='#b5741f';ctx.lineWidth=0.8;for(let i=0;i<12;i++){const y=H*0.42+i*((H*(1-0.42))/12);ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(W,y);ctx.stroke();}ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,H*0.44);ctx.lineTo(W,H*0.44);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(W*0.15,H*0.44,60,0,Math.PI*0.6);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.stroke();}
function drawBackboard(){ctx.fillStyle='#888';ctx.fillRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+6,HOOP_Y-32,5,H-HOOP_Y);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(200,230,255,0.85)';ctx.fillRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+3,HOOP_Y-34,14,58);ctx.strokeStyle='#e74c3c';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.strokeRect(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+5,HOOP_Y-20,10,28);ctx.strokeStyle='#e74c3c';ctx.lineWidth=3;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R,HOOP_Y);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R+3,HOOP_Y);ctx.stroke();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.7)';ctx.lineWidth=1;for(let i=0;i<5;i++){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R+i*(HOOP_R*2/4),HOOP_Y);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R/2+i*(HOOP_R/2),HOOP_Y+22);ctx.stroke();}ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R,HOOP_Y+8);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R,HOOP_Y+8);ctx.moveTo(HOOP_X-HOOP_R+2,HOOP_Y+16);ctx.lineTo(HOOP_X+HOOP_R-2,HOOP_Y+16);ctx.stroke();}
function drawPlayer(){ctx.fillStyle='#f4a261';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(BX,BY-50,13,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();ctx.fillStyle=ballColor;ctx.fillRect(BX-11,BY-37,22,28);ctx.fillStyle='#1e293b';ctx.fillRect(BX-10,BY-9,20,16);ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.3)';ctx.lineWidth=1.5;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX-11,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX-17,BY+14);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX+11,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX+24,BY-24);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX-4,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX-9,BY+30);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(BX+4,BY-9);ctx.lineTo(BX+9,BY+30);ctx.stroke();}
function drawBall(x,y,s){ctx.save();ctx.translate(x,y);ctx.rotate(s||0);ctx.fillStyle=ballColor;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.35)';ctx.lineWidth=1.3;ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(-12,0);ctx.lineTo(12,0);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,0,Math.PI);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(0,0,12,Math.PI,0);ctx.stroke();ctx.restore();}
function spawnConfetti(){for(let i=0;i<40;i++)confetti.push({x:HOOP_X+Math.random()*40-20,y:HOOP_Y,vx:(Math.random()-0.5)*4,vy:-Math.random()*5-2,color:['#f59e0b','#e74c3c','#3b82f6','#ec4899','#27ae60','#fff'][Math.floor(Math.random()*6)],life:1,w:5+Math.random()*5,h:4+Math.random()*3});}
function updateConfetti(){confetti=confetti.filter(c=>c.life>0);confetti.forEach(c=>{c.x+=c.vx;c.y+=c.vy;c.vy+=0.15;c.life-=0.025;ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=c.life;ctx.fillStyle=c.color;ctx.fillRect(c.x,c.y,c.w,c.h);ctx.restore();});}
function redrawStatic(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);drawStands();drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();drawBall(BX+18,BY-32,0);}
function updateBar(){const bar=document.getElementById('timing-bar');bar.style.width=timerVal+'%';bar.style.background=(timerVal>38&&timerVal<62)?'#27ae60':ballColor;}

function updateShotDots(){
  const el=document.getElementById('shots-display');el.innerHTML='';
  for(let i=0;i<MAX_SHOTS;i++){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='shot-dot';if(i<shotResults.length)d.classList.add(shotResults[i]);else if(i===shotsUsed&&!gameOver)d.classList.add('pending');el.appendChild(d);}
}
function updateStats(){
  document.getElementById('score').textContent=score;
  document.getElementById('shots-left').textContent=Math.max(0,MAX_SHOTS-shotsUsed);
  document.getElementById('pct').textContent=shotsUsed?Math.round(makes/shotsUsed*100)+'%':'0%';
}
function setMsg(t,c){const m=document.getElementById('msg');m.textContent=t;m.style.color=c||'var(--color-text-primary)';}

function animate(){
  ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);drawStands();
  if(cheerTimer>0)cheerTimer--;
  drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();updateConfetti();
  if(state==='timing'){timerVal+=timerDir*timerSpeed;if(timerVal>=100||timerVal<=0)timerDir*=-1;updateBar();drawBall(BX+18,BY-32,0);}
  if(state==='flying'){
    ballX+=ballVx;ballY+=ballVy;ballVy+=0.3;spin+=0.13;drawBall(ballX,ballY,spin);
    const dx=ballX-HOOP_X,dy=ballY-HOOP_Y;
    if(!scored&&Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy)<HOOP_R+3){
      scored=true;makes++;score+=2;shotsUsed++;shotResults.push('make');
      updateStats();updateShotDots();setMsg('BASKET! +2','#27ae60');cheerTimer=90;spawnConfetti();state='done';
      if(shotsUsed>=MAX_SHOTS)setTimeout(triggerGameOver,1600);else setTimeout(reset,1600);return;
    }
    if(ballY>H+20){
      if(!scored){shotsUsed++;shotResults.push('miss');updateStats();updateShotDots();setMsg('Miss!','#e74c3c');state='done';if(shotsUsed>=MAX_SHOTS)setTimeout(triggerGameOver,1200);else setTimeout(reset,1200);}return;
    }
  }
  if(state!=='done')animId=requestAnimationFrame(animate);
  else{ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);drawStands();drawCrowd();drawFloor();drawBackboard();drawPlayer();}
}

function reset(){
  if(gameOver)return;
  state='idle';timerVal=0;timerDir=1;scored=false;
  document.getElementById('timing-bar').style.width='0%';
  const left=MAX_SHOTS-shotsUsed;
  setMsg(`Press SHOOT! (${left} shot${left===1?'':'s'} left)`);
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='SHOOT';
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').disabled=false;
  cancelAnimationFrame(animId);redrawStatic();
}

async function triggerGameOver(){
  gameOver=true;cancelAnimationFrame(animId);
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').disabled=true;
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='GAME OVER';
  setMsg('Game Over!','#e25822');
  await showEndgameModal();
}

async function showEndgameModal(){
  document.getElementById('modal-score').textContent=score+' pts';
  document.getElementById('modal-sub').textContent=`${makes}/${MAX_SHOTS} baskets • ${Math.round(makes/MAX_SHOTS*100)}% accuracy`;
  const isHard=diffLabel==='Hard';
  document.getElementById('name-section').style.display=isHard?'flex':'none';
  document.getElementById('modal-not-hard').style.display=isHard?'none':'block';
  if(!isHard){
    const data=await loadLB();renderModalLB(data,null);
    document.getElementById('modal-lb').style.display='block';
  }
  document.getElementById('endgame-overlay').classList.add('show');
  if(isHard)document.getElementById('modal-name-input').focus();
}

function renderLB(data){
  document.getElementById('lb-loading').textContent='';
  const el=document.getElementById('lb-list');
  if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="lb-empty">Hard modda henüz skor yok. İlk sen ol!</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML=data.slice(0,10).map((r,i)=>`
    <div class="lb-row">
      <span class="lb-rank">${i===0?'🥇':i===1?'🥈':i===2?'🥉':i+1}</span>
      <span class="lb-name">${r.name}</span>
      <span class="lb-score">${r.score} pts</span>
    </div>`).join('');
}

function renderModalLB(data,highlightEntry){
  const el=document.getElementById('modal-lb-list');
  if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="lb-empty">Henüz skor yok!</div>';return;}
  el.innerHTML=data.slice(0,10).map((r,i)=>{
    const isMe=highlightEntry&&r.ts===highlightEntry.ts;
    return `<div class="lb-row${isMe?' highlight':''}">
      <span class="lb-rank">${i===0?'🥇':i===1?'🥈':i===2?'🥉':i+1}</span>
      <span class="lb-name">${r.name}${isMe?' ← Sen':''}</span>
      <span class="lb-score">${r.score} pts</span>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
}

document.getElementById('shoot-btn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  if(gameOver)return;
  if(state==='idle'){state='timing';document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='RELEASE!';setMsg('Release at the green zone!');animate();}
  else if(state==='timing'){
    const green=timerVal>38&&timerVal<62;
    const off=green?0:(timerVal<38?(timerVal-38)/38:(timerVal-62)/38);
    ballX=BX+18;ballY=BY-32;ballVx=4.4;ballVy=Math.tan(-1.08+off*0.55)*ballVx;
    state='flying';scored=false;document.getElementById('shoot-btn').textContent='...';
  }
});

document.querySelectorAll('#color-btns .pill-btn').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    document.querySelectorAll('#color-btns .pill-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    b.classList.add('active');ballColor=b.dataset.color;
    document.getElementById('shoot-btn').style.background=b.dataset.color;redrawStatic();
  });
});
document.querySelectorAll('#diff-btns .pill-btn').forEach(b=>{
  b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    if(shotsUsed>0)return;
    document.querySelectorAll('#diff-btns .pill-btn').forEach(x=>x.classList.remove('active'));
    b.classList.add('active');timerSpeed=parseFloat(b.dataset.speed);diffLabel=b.dataset.diff;
  });
});

document.getElementById('modal-save-btn').addEventListener('click',async()=>{
  if(scoreSaved)return;
  const name=document.getElementById('modal-name-input').value.trim();
  if(!name){document.getElementById('modal-status').textContent='Lütfen bir isim gir.';return;}
  document.getElementById('modal-save-btn').disabled=true;
  document.getElementById('modal-status').textContent='Kaydediliyor...';

  const data=await loadLB();
  const newEntry={name,score,ts:Date.now()};
  data.push(newEntry);
  data.sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score);
  const top=data.slice(0,10);
  const madeIt=top.some(r=>r.ts===newEntry.ts);

  if(madeIt){
    await saveLB(top);
    scoreSaved=true;
    document.getElementById('modal-status').textContent="İlk 10'dasın! 🎉";
    renderLB(top);
    renderModalLB(top,newEntry);
  } else {
    document.getElementById('modal-status').textContent="İlk 10'a giremedin, tekrar dene!";
    renderModalLB(top,null);
  }
  document.getElementById('modal-lb').style.display='block';
});

document.getElementById('play-again-btn').addEventListener('click',()=>{
  document.getElementById('endgame-overlay').classList.remove('show');
  score=0;makes=0;shotsUsed=0;shotResults=[];gameOver=false;scoreSaved=false;
  document.getElementById('modal-status').textContent='';
  document.getElementById('modal-save-btn').disabled=false;
  document.getElementById('modal-name-input').value='';
  document.getElementById('modal-lb').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').disabled=false;
  document.getElementById('shoot-btn').style.background=ballColor;
  updateStats();updateShotDots();
  reset();
  loadLB().then(renderLB);
});

// Init
updateShotDots();redrawStatic();
setInterval(()=>{if(state==='idle'&&!gameOver)redrawStatic();},50);
loadLB().then(renderLB);
</script>

```
